markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss recruiting strategy for input calibrators and output bar raisers to improve GrowthX's delivery team quality and efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shifting from hiring content managers to two key roles: input calibrators (client-facing strategists) and output bar raisers (editorial experts)](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)
  - [Seeking candidates with startup/agency experience, strong ownership mentality, and ability to manage multiple accounts efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Aiming to hire 2-3 managing editors in August to address performance issues in the current CM layer](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=3432.0)

## Topics

### Ideal Candidate Profiles

  - [Input calibrators: Similar to Ada and George - excellent at relationship building, highly reliable, strong communication skills, and ability to manage 8+ accounts](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Output bar raisers: Editorial experts like Sydney - meticulous attention to detail, never shipping subpar work](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Generalists preferred over specialists, with a focus on asking good questions and pragmatic problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

### Sourcing Strategies

  - [Target agencies with strong reputations (e.g., Animals, Verbatim, Story)](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
  - [Consider candidates from consulting backgrounds (e.g., McKinsey)](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [Look for people running or writing for reputable newsletters](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=3305.0)
  - [Explore content strategists with AI experience](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=2971.0)

### Interview Process

  - [Use in-depth career path exploration to identify patterns of ownership mentality and growth](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Implement paid assignments simulating client work (e.g., generating artifacts, presenting strategy)](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Assess preparation and genuine interest in the company](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)

### Compensation and Location

  - [Target range of $80-120k for managing editors, with flexibility up to $150k for exceptional U.S.-based candidates](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=2951.0)
  - [Preference for candidates outside high-cost areas like San Francisco and New York](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=3017.0)
  - [Consider international candidates with experience working with U.S. companies](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create a list of target candidates for Marcel to reach out to directly](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=2675.0)
  - [Compile a list of team members' favorite agencies to source from](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=2428.0)
  - [Begin aggressive hiring push for 2-3 managing editors to start in August](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=3432.0)
  - [Explore candidates from Morning Brew and similar newsletter companies](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=3314.0)
  - [Review and leverage the agency database shared in the Iron channel](https://fathom.video/share/UyyaNb3-zayLekho-Q-PMo1uQ66spHKF?tab=summary&timestamp=3114.0)
